series_metadata.series_description: Includes routine internal correspondence (emails, letters, memos), as well as correspondence from and responses to various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquiries. General correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy.)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion. ; Electronic: Retain six (6) months, then destroy. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
